# Dissimilate

> A curated journal of personal essays and Philippine mountain-climbing travel
> logs, written and photographed by a small circle of authors. Hand-built
> static site; every page's full text is in its HTML.

Site: https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/

## Mountain logs

- [Mt. Negron Traverse](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Star/Negron/): Star's 38–40 km backtrail traverse of Pampanga's highest peak — 16 river crossings, 24+ hours on trail.
- [Mt. Kotkot × Mt. Bukaw Full Circuit](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Star/Kotkot%20%C3%97%20Bukaw/): Star's twin-hike circuit — ridge lines, waterfalls below Bukaw, trail running in the rain.
- [Mt. Makiling Traverse](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Star/Makiling/): Star's traverse via Sipit Trail — cloud-forest canopy, a rare Rafflesia bloom, a trail-run descent.
- [Mt. Apo (Shieka)](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Shieka/Apo/): Shieka's photo journal of the Kapatagan–Digos route to the Philippines' highest summit.
- [Mt. Sumagaya to Mt. Lumot](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Shieka/Sumagaya/): Shieka's cloud-forest crossing in Claveria, Misamis Oriental.
- [Sumagaya — One Mountain, Two Climbs](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Raul/): Raul climbed Mt. Sumagaya in 1996; two years later Cebu Pacific Flight 387 crashed into the same ridge.
- [Mt. Apo (Genesis)](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Genesis/Apo/): Genesis on Apo's boulder fields and mossy forests.
- [Mt. Apo (Tristan)](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Tristan/Apo/): Tristan's account of the same range.
- [Buko-buko Peak](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Kim/Buko-buko%20Peak/): Kim's climb.
- [Mt. Matutum](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Lera%20%26%20Lara/Matutum/): Lera & Lara's twin log.
- [Mt. Kotkot & Bukaw (Allison)](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Allison/Kotkot%20x%20Bukaw/): Allison's soft, flower-picking diary of the same circuit.
- [Mt. Batulao](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Oli/Batulao/): Oli's golden-ridge climb.
- [Mt. Lumot × Mt. Sumagaya Traverse (Gladys)](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Gladys/Sumagaya/): Gladys's graph-paper photo journal of the mossy-forest traverse.
- [Into the Moss — Mt. Balatukan (Gladys)](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Gladys/Balatukan/): three days through Camp Rosas Pandan and Camp Enting to the 2,450-MASL summit.

## Author profiles

- [Star](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Star/): trail runner; three logs above.
- [Shieka](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Shieka/): album-style profile of her climbs.
- [Gladys](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Authors/Gladys/): graph-paper profile linking her two Misamis Oriental logs.

## Reference pages

- [Mt. Apo](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Mountains/Apo/Apo.html): mountain dashboard.
- [Mt. Matutum](https://markcling07.github.io/Dissimilate/Mountains/Matutum/matutum.html): mountain dashboard.
